reasoning:
Mamedyarov's FIDE rating on the November 2025 list (as found on Wikipedia) is 2742. A 1% increase would require him to reach an Elo of ~2770, which means an increase of about 28 points. 
1. 2025-11-16: Wikipedia's "FIDE rankings" page is updated monthly following the official FIDE list releases on the 1st of each month. Since the page was already updated with the Nov 1 rankings prior to Nov 9, the rating on Nov 16 will be identical to Nov 9 (2742). The probability of it being >2769 is effectively zero.
2. 2025-12-09: A 28-point classical Elo jump in a single month for an established Super Grandmaster is extraordinarily rare, requiring performance vastly above current level in a large number of games.
3. 2026-02-07: While he has three months to accumulate rating points, Mamedyarov is an older player and gaining 28 points to return to ~2770 (which would place him Top 5 globally right now) remains very unlikely. Uncertainty is slightly higher here given the longer timeframe.
